title: Configuring a License File Manually
breadcrumbs: Installing the Sentinel RMS License Manager on Windows
text: Configuring a License File Manually To configure a license later, you can do one of the following: Copy your license file to C:/Program Files (x86)/Common Files/SafeNet Sentinel/Sentinel RMS License Manager/WinNT , then restart the Sentinel RMS License Manager service. For more information about generating this file, see Configuring Network On-Premises Served Licenses . Use the Sentinel RMS License Manager Administration tool ( WlmAdmin.exe ) to configure your license. Activate your network cloud-served license using the Uniface License Management utility ( ulic ). For more information, see Configuring Network Cloud-Served Licenses . The RMS tools are located in C:/Program Files (x86)/Common Files/SafeNet Sentinel/Tools . Note: If you start the RMS License Manager or Sentinel Cloud Plug-in before configuring your license, restart these services once your license is configured. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
